khmer: សន្តិភាពចាប់ផ្ដើមពីចិត្តដែលចេះអត់ឱន។
english: Peace begins with a heart that knows patience.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្មារតីដឹងខ្លួនជាថ្នាំព្យាបាលដ៏ល្អបំផុតសម្រាប់ចិត្ត។
english: Mindfulness is the best medicine for the mind.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំរង់ចាំឱកាស ចូរបង្កើតវាដោយខ្លួនឯង។
english: Do not wait for opportunity; create it yourself.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: គ្រួសារគឺជាមូលដ្ឋានគ្រឹះនៃសង្គមដ៏រឹងមាំ។
english: Family is the foundation of a strong society.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ធម្មជាតិបង្រៀនយើងឲ្យចេះស្ងប់ស្ងាត់ និងចេះរីកចម្រើនបន្តិចម្តងៗ។
english: Nature teaches us to be still and to grow little by little.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការអប់រំពិតប្រាកដចាប់ផ្ដើមពីការស្រឡាញ់ការរៀនសូត្រ។
english: True education begins with a love for learning.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សេចក្តីមេត្តាមិនដែលខ្ជះខ្ជាយឡើយ។
english: Compassion is never wasted.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ទុក្ខដែលយើងអាចរៀនបាន គឺជាគ្រូដ៏ឆ្លាតវៃបំផុត។
english: Suffering we can learn from is the wisest teacher.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំវិនិច្ឆ័យអ្នកដទៃពីខាងក្រៅ ចូរយល់ពីដំណើររបស់គេ។
english: Do not judge others from the outside; understand their journey.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សុភមង្គលមិនមែនជាទីកន្លែងទេ តែជារបៀបនៃការធ្វើដំណើរ។
english: Happiness is not a destination, but a way of traveling.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដកដង្ហើមចូល ដឹងថាខ្លួនកំពុងដកដង្ហើមចូល ដកដង្ហើមចេញ ដឹងថាខ្លួនកំពុងដកដង្ហើមចេញ។
english: Breathing in, know that you are breathing in; breathing out, know that you are breathing out.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តស្ងប់ ឃើញផ្លូវច្បាស់។
english: When the mind is calm, the path becomes clear.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំឲ្យអតីតកាលកំណត់អនាគតរបស់អ្នក។
english: Do not let the past define your future.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្រឡាញ់ខ្លួនឯងជាមុនសិន ទើបអាចស្រឡាញ់អ្នកដទៃបានពេញលេញ។
english: Love yourself first, then you can love others fully.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ព្រៃឈើជាសួតនៃផែនដី ចូររួមគ្នាការពារ។
english: Forests are the lungs of the earth; let us protect them together.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ភាពបរាជ័យគឺជាជំហានមួយឆ្ពោះទៅរកភាពជោគជ័យ។
english: Failure is one step toward success.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កូនៗគឺជាកញ្ចក់ឆ្លុះបញ្ចាំងពីឪពុកម្តាយ។
english: Children are mirrors that reflect their parents.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: អត់ធ្មត់បន្តិច ទុក្ខក៏ថយបន្តិច។
english: A little patience reduces a little suffering.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តបើកទូលាយ ទទួលបានសេចក្តីសុខ។
english: An open mind receives peace.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនស្តាប់ឲ្យបានច្រើន និយាយឲ្យបានតិច។
english: Listen more, speak less.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មិនចាំបាច់ទៅណាឆ្ងាយ សុភមង្គលនៅក្នុងចិត្តយើង។
english: You don't need to go far; happiness is in your own heart.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ជួយអ្នកដទៃ គឺជួយខ្លួនឯង។
english: Helping others is helping yourself.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ទឹកហូរទៅកន្លែងទាប ចិត្តល្អហូរទៅកាន់មនុស្សគ្រប់គ្នា។
english: Water flows to low places; kindness flows to everyone.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំខ្លាចក្នុងការចាប់ផ្ដើមថ្មី។
english: Do not be afraid to start anew.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: គ្រូល្អមិនត្រឹមតែបង្រៀនចំណេះ តែបង្រៀនចិត្តផង។
english: A good teacher not only teaches knowledge but also teaches the heart.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្រឡាញ់ដោយមិនចង់បានអ្វីត្រឡប់មកវិញ ជាស្នេហ៍ដ៏បរិសុទ្ធ។
english: To love without expecting anything in return is pure love.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រាល់ថ្ងៃគឺជាឱកាសថ្មីដើម្បីផ្លាស់ប្តូរខ្លួនឯង។
english: Every day is a new opportunity to change yourself.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្ងប់ស្ងាត់ក្នុងចិត្ត ឃើញតម្លៃនៃជីវិត។
english: In stillness of mind, you see the value of life.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កំហឹងដូចភ្លើង ឆេះទាំងខ្លួនឯង និងអ្នកដទៃ។
english: Anger is like fire; it burns both yourself and others.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដើមឈើតូចធំឡើងបន្តិចម្តងៗ មនុស្សក៏ដូច្នោះដែរ។
english: A small tree grows little by little; people are the same.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: អ្នកមានសន្តិភាពក្នុងចិត្ត ជាអ្នកមានពិតប្រាកដ។
english: Those who have peace in their hearts are truly wealthy.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំបណ្តោយឲ្យភាពលំបាកបំបាក់ក្តីសង្ឃឹមរបស់អ្នក។
english: Do not let difficulties break your hope.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តល្អជាភាសាដែលថ្លង់ឮ ខ្វាក់ឃើញ។
english: Kindness is a language the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ឪពុកម្តាយជាពុទ្ធរូបដំបូងរបស់កូន។
english: Parents are the first Buddha statue of their children.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សូម្បីតែទឹកហូរក៏អាចហូរកាត់ថ្មបាន បើមានការតស៊ូ។
english: Even water can cut through stone with persistence.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មិនចាំបាច់ល្អឥតខ្ចោះ ចូរគ្រាន់តែជាខ្លួនឯងពិតប្រាកដ។
english: You don't need to be perfect; just be your true self.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនពីធម្មជាតិ ធម្មជាតិមិនដែលបង្រៀនខុសទេ។
english: Learn from nature; nature never teaches wrongly.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ញញឹមទុកជាអំណោយដល់អ្នកដទៃ។
english: Let your smile be a gift to others.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្មារតីដឹងខ្លួនជាកំពូលនៃបញ្ញា។
english: Mindfulness is the pinnacle of wisdom.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំវាស់តម្លៃមនុស្សដោយទ្រព្យសម្បត្តិ តែវាស់ដោយចិត្តរបស់គេ។
english: Do not measure a person's worth by wealth, but by their heart.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនអត់ទោស ដើម្បីសេរីភាពនៃចិត្ត។
english: Learn to forgive for the freedom of your mind.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ក្តីស្រមៃគ្មានព្រំដែន ចូរហ៊ានស្រមៃឲ្យធំ។
english: Dreams have no boundaries; dare to dream big.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: បើគ្មានសន្តិភាពក្នុងគ្រួសារ សន្តិភាពក្នុងសង្គមក៏គ្មានដែរ។
english: Without peace in the family, there is no peace in society.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំប្រញាប់ប្រញាល់ ជីវិតមិនមែនជាការប្រណាំងទេ។
english: Do not rush; life is not a race.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មនុស្សគ្រប់រូបមានតម្លៃស្មើគ្នានៅចំពោះមុខមេត្តា។
english: Every person has equal value in the face of compassion.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការអប់រំមិនត្រឹមតែនៅក្នុងសាលា តែនៅគ្រប់ទីកន្លែង។
english: Education is not only in school, but everywhere.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្រឡាញ់ដោយមិនជាប់ចិត្ត ជាស្នេហ៍ដែលមិនធ្វើឲ្យឈឺចាប់។
english: To love without attachment is a love that does not cause pain.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រាល់បញ្ហាសុទ្ធតែមានដំណោះស្រាយ បើយើងស្ងប់ស្ងាត់គិត។
english: Every problem has a solution if we think calmly.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដើរយឺតៗ ប៉ុន្តែកុំឈប់។
english: Walk slowly, but do not stop.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: បរិស្ថានស្អាត ចិត្តក៏ស្អាតតាម។
english: A clean environment brings a clean mind.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សុខសាន្តក្នុងចិត្ត ជាសុខដែលគ្មានអ្វីប្រៀប។
english: Peace in the mind is a happiness beyond compare.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំវិនិច្ឆ័យខ្លួនឯងពេក អ្នកកំពុងរៀននៅឡើយ។
english: Do not judge yourself too harshly; you are still learning.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ជួយគ្នាបន្តិចបន្តួច ក៏អាចផ្លាស់ប្តូរជីវិតគេបាន។
english: A little help can change someone's life.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការស្តាប់ដោយចិត្តបើកចំហ ជាអំណោយដ៏ថ្លៃថ្លា។
english: Listening with an open heart is a precious gift.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំខ្លាចកំហុស កំហុសបង្រៀនយើងឲ្យក្លាយជាមនុស្សកាន់តែល្អ។
english: Do not fear mistakes; mistakes teach us to become better people.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្នេហ៍ពិតមិនរើសមុខ មិនរើសពូជ មិនរើសសាសនា។
english: True love does not discriminate by face, race, or religion.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដើមឈើនីមួយៗសុទ្ធតែមានជីវិត ចូរគោរព។
english: Every tree has life; respect it.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ទុក្ខលំបាកសព្វថ្ងៃ នឹងក្លាយជារឿងរ៉ាវឲ្យយើងសើចនៅថ្ងៃអនាគត។
english: Today's hardships will become stories we laugh about in the future.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តស្ងប់ សុខភាពល្អ។
english: A calm mind brings good health.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំរង់ចាំអ្នកដទៃផ្លាស់ប្តូរ ចូរផ្លាស់ប្តូរខ្លួនឯងសិន។
english: Do not wait for others to change; change yourself first.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពមិនមែនមានន័យថាគ្មានសំឡេង តែមានន័យថាគ្មានការឈឺចាប់។
english: Peace does not mean silence; it means no suffering.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: គ្រួសាររីករាយ សង្គមរីកចម្រើន។
english: Happy family, prosperous society.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនស្គាល់ខ្លួនឯង ជាមេរៀនដំបូងបំផុត។
english: Knowing yourself is the very first lesson.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មេត្តាមិនចេះអស់ បើយើងចេះចែករំលែក។
english: Compassion is endless if we know how to share.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំឲ្យភាពជោគជ័យធ្វើឲ្យអ្នកស្រវឹង កុំឲ្យបរាជ័យធ្វើឲ្យអ្នកបាក់ទឹកចិត្ត។
english: Do not let success intoxicate you; do not let failure discourage you.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ធម្មជាតិជាផ្ទះរបស់យើងទាំងអស់គ្នា។
english: Nature is the home of all of us.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនឲ្យបានច្រើន ដើម្បីឲ្យបានច្រើន។
english: Learn much in order to give much.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្នេហ៍ដូចផ្កា ត្រូវការទឹកចិត្តថែជារៀងរាល់ថ្ងៃ។
english: Love is like a flower; it needs daily care.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: គ្មានអ្វីពិបាកជាងការឈ្នះចិត្តខ្លួនឯងឡើយ។
english: Nothing is harder than conquering your own mind.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពចាប់ផ្ដើមពីការអត់ឱនគ្នាទៅវិញទៅមក។
english: Peace begins with mutual tolerance.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំបោះបង់ ទោះបីផ្លូវនៅឆ្ងាយក៏ដោយ។
english: Do not give up, even if the road is long.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សុភមង្គលពិតមិនមែនមកពីការមានច្រើន តែមកពីការចង់បានតិច។
english: True happiness comes not from having much, but from wanting little.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ជួយគ្នាទុកជាកុសល ជួយគ្នាទុកជាបុណ្យ។
english: Helping one another is merit; helping one another is blessing.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កំហឹងបំផ្លាញប្រាជ្ញា ដូចភ្លើងឆេះព្រៃ។
english: Anger destroys wisdom like fire burns the forest.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំប្រើពាក្យសម្តីធ្វើឲ្យអ្នកដទៃឈឺចាប់ ព្រោះរបួសចិត្តជាសះស្បើយយឺតជាងរបួសសាច់។
english: Do not use words to hurt others, because emotional wounds heal slower than physical wounds.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ផ្ទះស្អាត ចិត្តស្អាត។
english: A clean home, a clean mind.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រាល់ព្រឹកព្រលឹម ជាឱកាសថ្មីដើម្បីចាប់ផ្ដើម។
english: Every dawn is a new chance to begin.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ធម្មជាតិបង្រៀនយើងឲ្យចេះប្រែប្រួលតាមកាលៈទេសៈ។
english: Nature teaches us to adapt to circumstances.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្រឡាញ់ដោយគ្មានលក្ខខណ្ឌ ជាស្នេហ៍ដ៏ខ្ពង់ខ្ពស់បំផុត។
english: To love without conditions is the highest form of love.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំឲ្យអតីតកាលជាប់ជាខ្សែចងជើងអ្នក។
english: Do not let the past be chains on your feet.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សិស្សល្អមិនដែលឈប់រៀន។
english: A good student never stops learning.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពក្នុងចិត្ត នាំមកនូវសន្តិភាពក្នុងលោក។
english: Peace in the mind brings peace to the world.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនរស់នៅជាមួយបច្ចុប្បន្ន ព្រោះអតីតកន្លងហើយ អនាគតមិនទាន់មកដល់។
english: Learn to live in the present, for the past is gone and the future has not yet come.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: គ្រួសារសប្បាយ ជាទ្រព្យសម្បត្តិដ៏មានតម្លៃបំផុត។
english: A happy family is the most valuable treasure.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចូរកុំបណ្តោយឲ្យអ្នកដទៃកំណត់តម្លៃរបស់អ្នក។
english: Do not let others define your worth.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មេត្តាដូចទឹក ត្រជាក់រម្ងាប់កម្ដៅក្នុងចិត្ត។
english: Compassion is like water, cooling the heat in the heart.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំវិនិច្ឆ័យដើមឈើដោយសំបក ចូរវិនិច្ឆ័យដោយផ្លែរបស់វា។
english: Do not judge a tree by its bark, but by its fruit.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្នេហ៍ខ្លួនឯងជាគ្រឹះនៃស្នេហ៍អ្នកដទៃ។
english: Self-love is the foundation of love for others.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដើរក្នុងព្រៃ ឮសំឡេងស្ងប់ស្ងាត់ ជាឱសថសម្រាប់ចិត្ត។
english: Walking in the forest, hearing the silence, is medicine for the mind.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការអប់រំជាអាវុធដ៏មានឥទ្ធិពលបំផុតដើម្បីផ្លាស់ប្តូរពិភពលោក។
english: Education is the most powerful weapon to change the world.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពមិនមែនជាជោគវាសនា តែជាជម្រើស។
english: Peace is not fate, but a choice.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រាល់ការបញ្ចប់ គឺជាការចាប់ផ្ដើមថ្មី។
english: Every ending is a new beginning.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តល្អមិនដែលខាតបង់ឡើយ។
english: Kindness is never a loss.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំខ្លាចនៅម្នាក់ឯង ចូរខ្លាចនៅជាមួយមនុស្សខុស។
english: Do not fear being alone; fear being with the wrong people.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដកដង្ហើមជ្រៅៗ ពេលចិត្តច្របូកច្របល់។
english: Breathe deeply when the mind is troubled.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ឪពុកម្តាយល្អ កូនល្អ។
english: Good parents, good children.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្រឡាញ់ដោយមិនចង់កាន់កាប់ ជាស្នេហ៍រំដោះ។
english: To love without wanting to possess is liberating love.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ធម្មជាតិមិនត្រូវការមនុស្សទេ តែមនុស្សត្រូវការធម្មជាតិ។
english: Nature does not need humans, but humans need nature.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនពីកំហុស កុំឲ្យកំហុសរៀនពីអ្នក។
english: Learn from mistakes; do not let mistakes learn from you.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពចាប់ផ្ដើមពីតុបាយគ្រួសារ។
english: Peace begins at the family dining table.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំបណ្តោយឲ្យការភ័យខ្លាចគ្រប់គ្រងជីវិតរបស់អ្នក។
english: Do not let fear control your life.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តបរិសុទ្ធ ឃើញអ្វីៗសុទ្ធសាធ។
english: A pure mind sees everything as pure.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ជួយគ្នាបន្តិចម្តងៗ ក៏កសាងសង្គមបាន។
english: Helping each other little by little builds society.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: អ្នកចេះអត់ទោស ជាអ្នកមានអំណាចពិតប្រាកដ។
english: One who knows how to forgive is truly powerful.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំវាស់ជីវិតដោយចំនួនដង្ហើម តែវាស់ដោយពេលវេលាដែលធ្វើឲ្យអ្នកភ្ញាក់ផ្អើល។
english: Do not measure life by the number of breaths, but by the moments that take your breath away.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្នេហ៍គឺឆ្លើយតបនឹងសំណួរដែលគ្មាននរណាសួរ។
english: Love is answering a question no one asked.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ផ្ការីកតាមរដូវ មនុស្សរីកតាមចិត្ត។
english: Flowers bloom according to season; people bloom according to heart.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការអប់រំល្អ បង្កើតមនុស្សល្អ។
english: Good education creates good people.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពមិនមែនជាអ្វីដែលរកឃើញ តែជាអ្វីដែលបង្កើត។
english: Peace is not something you find; it is something you create.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តស្ងប់ ទើបឃើញផ្លូវត្រូវ។
english: A calm mind sees the right path.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំបណ្តោយឲ្យភាពជោគជ័យនាំឲ្យភ្លេចខ្លួន។
english: Do not let success make you forget yourself.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: គ្រួសារស្អាត សង្គមស្អាត។
english: A clean family, a clean society.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនឲ្យបានច្រើន ដើម្បីជួយអ្នកដទៃបានច្រើន។
english: Learn much so you can help others much.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្នេហ៍មិនត្រូវការពាក្យសម្តី តែត្រូវការសកម្មភាព។
english: Love does not need words; it needs action.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដើមឈើធំដុះពីគ្រាប់តូច។
english: A big tree grows from a small seed.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការតស៊ូជាប់ជាប្រចាំ នាំទៅរកភាពអស្ចារ្យ។
english: Consistent perseverance leads to greatness.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពជាមរតកដ៏ថ្លៃថ្លាបំផុតសម្រាប់កូនចៅ។
english: Peace is the most precious inheritance for descendants.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មេត្តាមិនរើសអើង ដូចពន្លឺថ្ងៃរះស្មើគ្រប់គ្នា។
english: Compassion does not discriminate, like the sunrise that shines equally on everyone.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំឲ្យអ្នកដទៃកំណត់សុភមង្គលរបស់អ្នក។
english: Do not let others define your happiness.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដកដង្ហើមមួយជំហាន ដើរមួយជំហាន។
english: One breath, one step.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កំហុសគឺជាគ្រូ មិនមែនជាសត្រូវ។
english: Mistakes are teachers, not enemies.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ផ្ទះគ្មានស្នេហ៍ ដូចដើមឈើគ្មានម្លប់។
english: A home without love is like a tree without shade.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ធម្មជាតិព្យាបាលចិត្តដោយស្ងាត់ស្ងៀម។
english: Nature heals the mind in silence.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្រឡាញ់ខ្លួនឯងគ្រប់គ្រាន់ ទើបដឹងថាអ្វីល្អសម្រាប់ខ្លួន។
english: Love yourself enough to know what is good for you.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ជោគជ័យពិត គឺជោគជ័យលើចិត្តខ្លួនឯង។
english: True success is conquering your own mind.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពចាប់ផ្ដើមពីការគោរពគ្នាទៅវិញទៅមក។
english: Peace begins with mutual respect.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំខ្លាចការចាប់ផ្ដើមតូច ចូរខ្លាចការមិនចាប់ផ្ដើមសោះ។
english: Do not fear a small beginning; fear not beginning at all.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តល្អមិនដែលចាញ់គេឡើយ។
english: A kind heart never loses.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនស្តាប់សំឡេងខាងក្នុងរបស់ខ្លួនឯង។
english: Learn to listen to your inner voice.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការអប់រំមិនចេះចប់ ដូចមហាសមុទ្រគ្មានទីបញ្ចប់។
english: Education never ends, like the ocean has no end.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្នេហ៍ពិតគឺឲ្យដោយមិនគិតយក។
english: True love gives without thinking of taking.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ព្រៃឈើជាសម្បត្តិរបស់កូនចៅជំនាន់ក្រោយ។
english: Forests are the heritage of future generations.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ទុក្ខបង្រៀនយើងឲ្យដឹងគុណនឹងសុខ។
english: Suffering teaches us to appreciate happiness.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: គ្រួសាររួបរួម ជាកម្លាំងដ៏ខ្លាំងក្លា។
english: A united family is a powerful force.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពមិនមែនអវត្តមាននៃជម្លោះ តែជាសមត្ថភាពក្នុងការដោះស្រាយជម្លោះដោយសន្តិវិធី។
english: Peace is not the absence of conflict, but the ability to resolve conflict peacefully.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំបណ្តោយឲ្យការភ័យខ្លាចបិទបាំងក្តីសង្ឃឹមរបស់អ្នក។
english: Do not let fear overshadow your hope.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ញញឹមទុកជាថ្នាំបំបាត់ទុក្ខ។
english: Let your smile be medicine for sorrow.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តបើកចំហ ទទួលបានចំណេះថ្មីៗជានិច្ច។
english: An open mind always receives new knowledge.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មេត្តាជាភាសាដែលគ្មានព្រំដែន។
english: Compassion is a language without borders.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដើរយ повільнៗ តែកុំឈប់។
english: Walk slowly, but never stop.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្រឡាញ់ដោយគ្មានការរំពឹងទុក ជាស្នេហ៍រំដោះទុក្ខ។
english: To love without expectation is love that frees from suffering.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ធម្មជាតិបង្រៀនយើងឲ្យចេះរង់ចាំ។
english: Nature teaches us to wait patiently.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំវាស់តម្លៃមនុស្សដោយសម្លៀកបំពាក់។
english: Do not measure a person's worth by their clothes.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពក្នុងគ្រួសារ នាំមកនូវសន្តិភាពក្នុងសង្គម។
english: Peace in the family brings peace to society.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនអត់ទោសឲ្យខ្លួនឯង មុននឹងអត់ទោសឲ្យអ្នកដទៃ។
english: Learn to forgive yourself before forgiving others.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការតស៊ូរាល់ថ្ងៃ បង្កើតបានជាជោគជ័យដ៏ធំ។
english: Daily perseverance creates great success.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្នេហ៍គឺស្អាត ពេលគ្មានការក្លែងបន្លំ។
english: Love is beautiful when there is no pretense.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំបំផ្លាញព្រៃឈើ ព្រោះវាជាផ្ទះរបស់សត្វជាច្រើន។
english: Do not destroy the forest, for it is home to many creatures.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តស្ងប់ គេងលក់ស្រួល។
english: A calm mind sleeps well.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: អ្នកមានចំណេះ ជាអ្នកមានអនាគត។
english: Those with knowledge have a future.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សុភមង្គលគឺនៅត្រង់ថ្ងៃនេះ មិនមែនថ្ងៃស្អែកទេ។
english: Happiness is in today, not tomorrow.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មេត្តាដូចទឹកសន្សើម ស្រក់ចុះមកលើគ្រប់គ្នា។
english: Compassion is like dew, falling upon everyone.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំឲ្យភាពបរាជ័យធ្វើឲ្យអ្នកបាត់បង់ក្តីស្រមៃ។
english: Do not let failure make you lose your dreams.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពជាផ្លូវតែមួយគត់ឆ្ពោះទៅកាន់ការអភិវឌ្ឍន៍ប្រកបដោយចីរភាព។
english: Peace is the only path toward sustainable development.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ឪពុកម្តាយជាគ្រូដំបូងរបស់កូន។
english: Parents are the first teachers of their children.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដើរក្នុងធម្មជាតិ ឃើញតម្លៃនៃជីវិត។
english: Walking in nature, you see the value of life.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្រឡាញ់គ្នាដោយស្មោះ មិនត្រូវការភស្តុតាង។
english: Loving each other sincerely needs no proof.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនស្តាប់ដោយចិត្ត មិនមែនដោយត្រចៀកតែមួយមុខ។
english: Learn to listen with your heart, not just your ears.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ជោគជ័យមិនមែនសម្រាប់អ្នករង់ចាំ តែសម្រាប់អ្នកធ្វើសកម្មភាព។
english: Success is not for those who wait, but for those who take action.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: គ្រួសារល្អ សង្គមល្អ។
english: Good family, good society.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការអប់រំជាមូលដ្ឋានគ្រឹះនៃសុភមង្គល។
english: Education is the foundation of happiness.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពចាប់ផ្ដើមពីការចេះអភ័យទោស។
english: Peace begins with the ability to forgive.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មេត្តាជាថាមពលគ្មានទីបញ្ចប់។
english: Compassion is an endless energy.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំបណ្តោយឲ្យកំហឹងគ្រប់គ្រងអ្នក។
english: Do not let anger control you.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ធម្មជាតិស្អាត ចិត្តស្អាត។
english: Clean nature, clean mind.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្រឡាញ់ដោយមិនចង់បាន ជាស្នេហ៍ដ៏ខ្ពង់ខ្ពស់។
english: To love without wanting is the highest love.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនពីធម្មជាតិ ធម្មជាតិគ្មានការក្លែងបន្លំ។
english: Learn from nature; nature has no pretense.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សុភមង្គលគឺសាមញ្ញ បើយើងចេះឲ្យតម្លៃនឹងអ្វីដែលមាន។
english: Happiness is simple if we learn to value what we have.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តល្អឈ្នះអ្វីៗទាំងអស់។
english: Kindness conquers all.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំខ្លាចការលំបាក ព្រោះវាជាជណ្តើរឡើងទៅកាន់ភាពជោគជ័យ។
english: Do not fear difficulties, for they are the ladder to success.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពក្នុងចិត្ត ជាទ្រព្យសម្បត្តិដែលគ្មានតម្លៃប៉ាន់ស្មាន។
english: Peace in the mind is a treasure beyond measure.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ឪពុកម្តាយល្អ កូនល្អតាម។
english: Good parents raise good children.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការអប់រំជាសិទ្ធិរបស់មនុស្សគ្រប់រូប។
english: Education is the right of every person.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្នេហ៍ដូចផ្កាយ ភ្លឺក្នុងទីងងឹត។
english: Love is like a star, shining in the darkness.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដកដង្ហើមជ្រៅៗ ពេលចិត្តតានតឹង។
english: Breathe deeply when the mind is tense.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ធម្មជាតិផ្តល់ជីវិត ចូរកុំបំផ្លាញធម្មជាតិ។
english: Nature gives life; do not destroy nature.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ជោគជ័យមិនមែនជារឿងចៃដន្យ តែជារឿងនៃការតស៊ូ។
english: Success is not by chance, but by perseverance.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មេត្តាជាស្ពានភ្ជាប់ចិត្តមនុស្ស។
english: Compassion is the bridge connecting human hearts.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពមិនមែនសុបិន តែជាការពិតដែលយើងត្រូវកសាង។
english: Peace is not a dream, but a reality we must build.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំបណ្តោយឲ្យអ្នកដទៃបំផ្លាញក្តីសុបិនរបស់អ្នក។
english: Do not let others destroy your dreams.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: គ្រួសារសប្បាយ ជីវិតសប្បាយ។
english: Happy family, happy life.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: រៀនដើម្បីខ្លួនឯង មិនមែនដើម្បីអ្នកដទៃ។
english: Learn for yourself, not for others.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្រឡាញ់គ្នាទុកជាកុសល ជួយគ្នាទុកជាបុណ្យ។
english: Loving each other is merit; helping each other is blessing.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តស្ងប់ ឃើញសម្រស់នៃជីវិត។
english: A calm mind sees the beauty of life.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ធម្មជាតិបង្រៀនយើងឲ្យចេះបន្ទាបខ្លួន។
english: Nature teaches us humility.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំវិនិច្ឆ័យអ្នកដទៃ មុនពេលដើរក្នុងស្បែកជើងគេ។
english: Do not judge others before walking in their shoes.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពជាមូលដ្ឋានគ្រឹះនៃការរីកចម្រើន។
english: Peace is the foundation of progress.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មេត្តាមិនចេះអស់ បើយើងចេះបើកចិត្ត។
english: Compassion is endless if we open our hearts.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំបោះបង់ក្តីសង្ឃឹម ទោះបីយប់ងងឹតយូរប៉ុណ្ណាក៏ដោយ។
english: Do not give up hope, no matter how long the night.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ឪពុកម្តាយជាគ្រូបង្រៀនដំបូងបំផុតក្នុងជីវិត។
english: Parents are the very first teachers in life.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការអប់រំផ្លាស់ប្តូរជីវិត។
english: Education changes lives.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្នេហ៍គឺឆ្លើយតបនឹងសំណួរដែលគ្មាននរណាសួរ។
english: Love is answering a question no one asked.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ដើរយ повільнៗ រសជាតិជីវិតកាន់តែឆ្ងាញ់។
english: Walk slowly; the taste of life becomes sweeter.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ធម្មជាតិមិនដែលប្រញាប់ តែអ្វីៗសម្រេចបានទាំងអស់។
english: Nature never rushes, yet everything is accomplished.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សុភមង្គលគឺនៅក្នុងដៃរបស់អ្នក មិនមែននៅក្នុងដៃអ្នកដទៃទេ។
english: Happiness is in your hands, not in the hands of others.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ជោគជ័យចាប់ផ្ដើមពីជំហានតូចមួយ។
english: Success begins with one small step.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពជាសិទ្ធិរបស់មនុស្សគ្រប់រូប។
english: Peace is the right of every human being.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មេត្តាមិនដែលខាតបង់ឡើយ ទោះបីគេមិនដឹងគុណក៏ដោយ។
english: Compassion is never wasted, even if it is not appreciated.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំខ្លាចការផ្លាស់ប្តូរ ព្រោះការផ្លាស់ប្តូរនាំមកនូវការរីកចម្រើន។
english: Do not fear change, for change brings growth.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: គ្រួសារជាទីពឹងរបស់មនុស្សគ្រប់រូប។
english: Family is the refuge for every person.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ការអប់រំបើកទ្វារនៃឱកាស។
english: Education opens the door of opportunity.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ស្រឡាញ់ដោយស្មោះ មិនត្រូវការពាក្យសម្តីច្រើន។
english: To love sincerely does not require many words.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ចិត្តស្ងប់ រាងកាយស្ងប់។
english: A calm mind, a calm body.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ធម្មជាតិជាឱសថសម្រាប់ព្រលឹង។
english: Nature is medicine for the soul.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សុភមង្គលគឺជាការធ្វើដំណើរ មិនមែនជាគោលដៅទេ។
english: Happiness is the journey, not the destination.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: ជោគជ័យពិតប្រាកដ គឺពេលអ្នកជួយអ្នកដទៃឲ្យជោគជ័យផងដែរ។
english: True success is when you help others succeed as well.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: សន្តិភាពចាប់ផ្ដើមពីការចេះស្តាប់គ្នាទៅវិញទៅមក។
english: Peace begins with learning to listen to one another.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: មេត្តាជាភាសាដែលមនុស្សគ្រប់គ្នាយល់។
english: Compassion is a language everyone understands.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap

khmer: កុំបណ្តោយឲ្យអតីតកាលរារាំងអនាគតរបស់អ្នក។
english: Do not let the past block your future.
author: Inspired by Kou Sopheap
